CHAIN-FORWARDED.summary: Pass-through chain notification (over TCP). Sent by an upstream peer (leader → F1, or Fk → F(k+1)) after it has completed an RDMA-WRITE of n_slots × RDMAMIG_BLOCK_SIZE_BYTES into this follower's landing pool. The slot list tells the follower which slot id maps to which 2 MiB block (offset i = i × RDMAMIG_BLOCK_SIZE_BYTES). Each block is decoded per-slot via rdmaApplySlotBlock. If not the chain tail, this follower's chain worker thread RDMA-WRITEs the same blocks onward to its successor with the same slot list.
CHAIN-FORWARDED.complexity: O(n_slots) decode + O(n_slots * 2MiB) RDMA WRITE per hop.
